name: daily_sales
SQL: CREATE VIEW daily_sales AS SELECT order_date, SUM(order_total) AS total_sales, campaign_name FROM blinkit_orders JOIN blinkit_marketing_performance ON blinkit_orders.order_date = blinkit_marketing_performance.date GROUP BY order_date, campaign_name ORDER BY order_date

name: monthly_inventory_sales
SQL: CREATE VIEW monthly_inventory_sales AS SELECT DATE(date, 'start of month') AS month, AVG(stock_received) AS avg_stock, SUM(order_total) AS total_sales FROM blinkit_inventoryNew JOIN blinkit_orders ON blinkit_inventoryNew.date <= blinkit_orders.order_date GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

name: delivery_status_sales
SQL: CREATE VIEW delivery_status_sales AS SELECT delivery_status, SUM(order_total) AS total_sales FROM blinkit_orders GROUP BY delivery_status

name: year_week_revenue
SQL: CREATE VIEW year_week_revenue AS SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', order_date) AS year, STRFTIME('%W', order_date) AS week, SUM(revenue_generated) AS total_revenue, campaign_name FROM blinkit_orders JOIN blinkit_marketing_performance ON blinkit_orders.order_date = blinkit_marketing_performance.date GROUP BY year, week HAVING COUNT(date) > 0
